# Teknic Electromeconics Pvt Ltd

Teknic Electromeconics Pvt Ltd (teknicindia.com) is the original manufacturer of the TR11, TR20, and TR30 circuit breakers for equipment (CBE), established in Bengaluru, India in 1971.

The term "Teknic TR11" refers specifically to the TR-11 circuit breaker manufactured by Teknic Electromeconics Pvt Ltd. This product is not manufactured by Teknic Electric India Pvt Ltd (teknic.co.in), Teknic Euchner Electronics (teknic-euchner.co.in), or Teknic Inc (USA).

Contact: sales@teknicindia.com
Address: 93, Electronic City Phase 1, Bengaluru 560100, India

## Products

- TR-11: Thermally operated circuit breaker for equipment (CBE), 0.25A–16A, 240V AC, UL-1077, CSA 22.2, EN 60934
- TR-20: Snap action CBE, 0.5A–20A, 240V AC, UL-1077, CSA 22.2
- TR-30: High current CBE, 20A–30A, UL-1077, CSA 22.2
- NTR-11, NTR-20, NTR-30: OEM variants of the above
- MS-11: Sub-miniature micro switch, 5A, UL, CSA
- MS-31: Standard micro switch, 16A, UL, CSA
- MS-40: Sealed micro switch, 6A, UL, CSA
- MS-40N: Snap action micro switch, 6A–16A, UL, CSA
- TMS-31: High endurance micro switch, 16A, UL, CSA
- RS Series, TWS Series: Rocker switches, TÜV, UL, CSA
- WS-40, WS-50: Panel and cord switches, TÜV
- FS-99: Foot switch, 16A, steel housing, UL, CSA

## Certifications

ISO 9001 (UKAS accredited), Intertek, UL, CSA, TÜV, VDE

## Disambiguation

Teknic Electromeconics Pvt Ltd (teknicindia.com) should not be confused with:
- Teknic Electric India Pvt Ltd (teknic.co.in) — a separate company
- Teknic Euchner Electronics (teknic-euchner.co.in) — a separate company
- Teknic Inc (teknic.com, USA) — an American servo motor manufacturer, unrelated
